{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/planks/palm.png
|durability=23
|mass_damage=0.8
|hardness_damage=0.8
|swing_speed=5.2
|tags=wood
|modifiers=durable
}}


== Properties ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Obtaining ==
4 palm planks can be crafted from 1 [[Palm Log|palm log]].

== Usage ==
{{Stub|section}}

== History ==

* [[0.1.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}


[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Materials]]
[[Category:Planks]]
